dylan turns will be left alone at the front of the race going over the top of the cordell colombia the final climb of the day pogacha a second over at 31 seconds and you wondered if he'd catch him the to get to his yellow jersey dream dylan turns celebrated with bahrain victorious taking their second win in as many days some huge gaps between the top finishers and the gc favorites are exchanging white for yellow many thought that stage eight would be the first proper day of the tour as the race hit the mountains most will now be wondering if it realistically was also the last one minute 48 to to come clues to tina 145 kilometers our first all category climb of this race and a finishing tenure two years after the stage there had to be cancelled because of a landslide we know that anything
